items.title: qwen3.5
items.description: The Qwen3.5 series 397B-A17B native vision-language model is built on a hybrid architecture that integrates a linear attention mechanism with a sparse mixture-of-experts model, achieving higher inference efficiency.

items.title: glm-5
items.description: A strong reasoning and agentic model from Z.ai with 744B total parameters (40B active), built for complex systems engineering and long-horizon tasks.

items.title: minimax-m2.5
items.description: MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art large language model designed for real-world productivity and coding tasks.

items.title: qwen3-coder-next
items.description: Qwen3-Coder-Next is a coding-focused language model from Alibaba's Qwen team, optimized for agentic coding workflows and local development.

items.title: glm-ocr
items.description: GLM-OCR is a multimodal OCR model for complex document understanding, built on the GLM-V encoder–decoder architecture.

items.title: kimi-k2.5
items.description: Kimi K2.5 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model that seamlessly integrates vision and language understanding with advanced agentic capabilities, instant and thinking modes, as well as conversational and agentic paradigms.

items.title: lfm2.5-thinking
items.description: LFM2.5 is a new family of hybrid models designed for on-device deployment.

items.title: glm-4.7-flash
items.description: As the strongest model in the 30B class, GLM-4.7-Flash offers a new option for lightweight deployment that balances performance and efficiency.

items.title: translategemma
items.description: A new collection of open translation models built on Gemma 3, helping people communicate across 55 languages.

items.title: glm-4.7
items.description: Advancing the Coding Capability

items.title: minimax-m2.1
items.description: Exceptional multilingual capabilities to elevate code engineering

items.title: gemini-3-flash-preview
items.description: Gemini 3 Flash offers frontier intelligence built for speed at a fraction of the cost.

items.title: nemotron-3-nano
items.description: Nemotron 3 Nano - A new Standard for Efficient, Open, and Intelligent Agentic Models

items.title: functiongemma
items.description: FunctionGemma is a specialized version of Google's Gemma 3 270M model fine-tuned explicitly for function calling.

items.title: olmo-3.1
items.description: Olmo is a series of Open language models designed to enable the science of language models. These models are pre-trained on the Dolma 3 dataset and post-trained on the Dolci datasets.

items.title: olmo-3
items.description: Olmo is a series of Open language models designed to enable the science of language models. These models are pre-trained on the Dolma 3 dataset and post-trained on the Dolci datasets.

items.title: nomic-embed-text-v2-moe
items.description: nomic-embed-text-v2-moe is a multilingual MoE text embedding model that excels at multilingual retrieval.

items.title: devstral-small-2
items.description: 24B model that excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files and power software engineering agents.

items.title: rnj-1
items.description: Rnj-1 is a family of 8B parameter open-weight, dense models trained from scratch by Essential AI, optimized for code and STEM with capabilities on par with SOTA open-weight models.

items.title: deepseek-v3.2
items.description: DeepSeek-V3.2, a model that harmonizes high computational efficiency with superior reasoning and agent performance.
